tokens.name: --font-mono
tokens.value: "JetBrains Mono", "JetBrains Mono NL", ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Consolas, "Liberation Mono", monospace

classes.name: dx-action
classes.rule: display: inline-grid; place-items: center; background: hsl(var(--foreground)); color: hsl(var(--background));

classes.name: dx-card
classes.rule: width: min(100%, 76rem); border: 1px solid hsl(var(--border)); border-radius: var(--radius); background: hsl(var(--card)); box-shadow: 0 1px 0 hsl(var(--foreground) / 0.04) inset; padding: clamp(1.25rem, 3vw, 2.25rem);

classes.name: dx-grid
classes.rule: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(min(18rem, 100%), 1fr)); gap: 1rem;

classes.name: dx-muted
classes.rule: color: hsl(var(--muted));

classes.name: dx-page-shell
classes.rule: align-items: center;

classes.name: dx-secondary-action
classes.rule: min-height: 2.65rem; border-radius: var(--radius); border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); padding: 0.7rem 1rem; font: inherit; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.16s, border-color 0.16s, background 0.16s;

classes.name: dx-shell
classes.rule: min-height: 100vh; display: grid; place-items: center; padding: clamp(1rem, 3vw, 3rem);

classes.name: dx-stack
classes.rule: display: grid; gap: 1rem;

classes.name: dx-template
classes.rule: min-height: 100vh; background: hsl(var(--background)); color: hsl(var(--foreground));

classes.name: starter-action-button
classes.rule: min-height: 2.5rem; border: 1px solid hsl(var(--border)); border-radius: 8px; background: hsl(var(--foreground)); color: hsl(var(--background)); font: inherit; font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 700; text-decoration: none;

classes.name: starter-actions
classes.rule: display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center; justify-self: center; gap: 10px; width: min(100%, 34rem);

classes.name: starter-card
classes.rule: display: grid; width: min(100%, 640px); justify-items: center; gap: 18px; border: 1px solid hsl(var(--border)); border-radius: 14px; background: hsl(var(--card)); padding: clamp(28px, 5vw, 58px); text-align: center; box-shadow: 0 1px 0 hsl(var(--foreground) / 0.08) inset, 0 28px 80px hsl(var(--background) / 0.45);

classes.name: starter-copy
classes.rule: max-width: 34rem; margin: 0; color: hsl(var(--muted-foreground)); font-size: clamp(1rem, 2.2vw, 1.125rem); line-height: 1.7;

classes.name: starter-form
classes.rule: display: grid; width: min(100%, 34rem); justify-items: center; gap: 10px;

classes.name: starter-form-label
classes.rule: color: hsl(var(--muted-foreground)); font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 700;

classes.name: starter-form-panel
classes.rule: display: grid; justify-items: center; gap: 10px; width: 100%;

classes.name: starter-input
classes.rule: display: block; width: 100%; min-width: 0; min-height: 2.5rem; border: 1px solid hsl(var(--border)); border-radius: 8px; background: hsl(var(--surface)); color: hsl(var(--foreground)); font: inherit; padding: 0 0.85rem; text-align: center;

classes.name: starter-kicker
classes.rule: margin: 0 0 -2px; color: hsl(var(--muted-foreground)); font-size: clamp(1.12rem, 2.6vw, 1.45rem); font-weight: 750; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase;

classes.name: starter-link
classes.rule: display: inline-grid; place-items: center; padding: 0 1rem; text-align: center;

classes.name: starter-link-secondary
classes.rule: background: hsl(var(--card)); color: hsl(var(--foreground));

classes.name: starter-logo
classes.rule: width: 40px; height: 40px; object-fit: contain;

classes.name: starter-route-links
classes.rule: display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center; gap: 10px;

classes.name: starter-shell
classes.rule: display: grid; width: 100%; min-width: 100%; min-height: 100vh; min-height: 100dvh; place-items: center; padding: clamp(24px, 5vw, 64px);
